_comment: switch-web-browser itch.io app config. SD-editable at sdmc:/switch/brewser/apps/itchio/assets/config.json without rebuilding the .nro.
_feed_comment: Initial feed shown at boot. Accepted: 'newest' or 'top'. Tap the sidebar pills to switch at runtime.
_testGameUrl_comment: Slice-3 hardcoded launch target. Tapping Play on ANY card navigates here for now (per-card extraction is a later slice). Defaults to Wave Dodger (Unity WebGL build) since Unity surfaces the most engine gaps; swap to a lighter title like a PICO-8 cart to test other runtimes.
